title: stachys arvensis var. typica
intro: Stachys arvensis var. typica, commonly known as wild betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of wild betony include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating anxiety and insomnia. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
